allow: Bash(grep -E "< HTTP|< Access-Control|< Content-Type|< x-|authorization" echo "File size: $\(wc -c < /tmp/hf_test.jpg || echo 'none'\)")
Bash(grep -Ei "< HTTP|< access-control|< content-type|< x-" echo "File size: $\(wc -c < /tmp/hf_sdxl.jpg \)")
Bash(grep -Ei "< HTTP|< access-control|< content-type" echo "File size: $\(wc -c < /tmp/hf_sd21.jpg \)" echo "---Content start:" head -c 100 /tmp/hf_sd21.jpg)
Bash(grep -Ei "< HTTP|< access-control|< content-type|< x-error" echo "---" echo "File size: $\(wc -c < /tmp/hf_flux.bin \)" head -c 200 /tmp/hf_flux.bin)
Bash(grep -Ei "< HTTP|< access-control|< content-type|< x-error" echo "File size: $\(wc -c < /tmp/hf_router.bin \)" head -c 200 /tmp/hf_router.bin)
